title: Amtech G1666 Wall Tile Adhesive applicator
features: VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: This wall tile adhesive applicator has four 4mm notched edges on one edge and a flexible rubber grout spreader on the other edge for fast and easy application of tile adhesives
DURABLE BUILD: Made to withstand regular use in demanding environments
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No
